summaryTemplate: {{className}} is the {{patternRole}}. A context delegates to the current state object; swapping the concrete state changes the context's behaviour without conditional branching. Pattern body lives at {{file}}:{{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}.
chosenRationaleTemplate: Tagged as State because {{className}} declares a virtual handle/request-family method (lines {{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}) that a context calls, letting behaviour change by swapping the concrete state.

state_handle_method.note: State-specific behaviour. Each concrete state implements this differently; the context's behaviour changes by pointing at a different state, not by an if/switch.

runnerUpComparisonTemplates.Strategy: Strategy and State share the interface-and-implementations shape. State concretes typically trigger transitions to the next state; Strategy concretes are independent peers chosen externally and do not move the context between modes.
